items.title: Upgrade Docker Buildx Action to Latest Version in M C P Serp 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the Docker Buildx Action from version 1 to version 4, enhancing the workflow with the latest features and improvements. Key changes include setting Node 24 as the default runtime and removing deprecated inputs/outputs. This upgrade aims to streamline the build process and improve compatibility with newer dependencies.

items.title: Update Docker Buildx Action to Latest Version in M C P Sora 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the Docker Buildx Action from version 1 to 4, introducing several enhancements including Node 24 as the default runtime and the removal of deprecated inputs and outputs. The workflow file has been modified accordingly to reflect this change, ensuring improved performance and compatibility with the latest features.

items.title: Upgrade Python Setup Action to Version 6 in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the actions/setup-python from version 5 to 6, introducing compatibility with Node 24 and enhancing support for pip-version and Pipfile parsing. Key bug fixes and dependency updates are also included, ensuring a smoother development experience. Make sure to update your runner to version v2.327.1 or later for optimal performance.

items.title: Upgrade Codecov Action to v5 in M C P Suno 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the Codecov GitHub Action from version 4 to version 5, enhancing the action's performance and update speed. Key changes include the introduction of the Codecov Wrapper and the ability for public repositories to upload coverage reports without a token. Additionally, several dependencies have been updated to their latest versions for improved functionality.

items.title: Upgrade download-artifact to v8 for better performance in M C P Seedream 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the actions/download-artifact from version 4 to 8, enhancing the workflow's efficiency. Key changes include improved handling of non-zipped downloads and stricter hash mismatch checks for better security. The action now defaults to error on hash mismatches, ensuring a more reliable build process.

items.title: Upgrade Checkout Action to Version 6 in M C P Seedream 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the actions/checkout from version 4 to 6 across multiple workflow files. Key enhancements include improved credential handling and support for Node.js 24, ensuring better performance and compatibility. The changes will streamline CI processes and enhance security for future builds.

items.title: Upgrade download-artifact to v8 for better performance in M C P Flux 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the actions/download-artifact from version 4 to 8, enhancing the artifact downloading process. Key improvements include direct downloads without unzipping non-zipped files and stricter hash mismatch checks to ensure security. The action now defaults to error on hash mismatches, improving workflow reliability.

items.title: Upgrade Docker Login Action to Version 4 in M C P Flux 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the Docker Login Action from version 2 to version 4, enhancing the workflow with new features and improvements. Key changes include the switch to Node 24 as the default runtime and updates to various dependencies like @actions/core and @aws-sdk/client-ecr. This upgrade ensures better performance and compatibility with the latest standards.

items.title: Upgrade actions/checkout to v6 for improved functionality in M C P Suno 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the actions/checkout dependency from version 4 to 6 across multiple workflow files. Key improvements include enhanced credential handling and support for Node.js 24, ensuring better compatibility and performance in CI/CD processes.

items.title: Upgrade Docker Buildx Action to v4 in M C P Suno 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the Docker Buildx Action from version 1 to 4, enhancing the workflow with improved Node runtime support and removing deprecated inputs. Key changes include switching to ESM and updating dependencies, which will streamline the build process and improve performance.

items.title: Update Docker Login Action to v4 in M C P Midjourney 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the Docker Login Action from version 2 to version 4, introducing Node 24 as the default runtime and switching to ESM. Key dependencies have also been updated, including @actions/core and AWS SDK clients, enhancing compatibility and performance. This change ensures that the workflow remains up-to-date with the latest features and security improvements.

items.title: Update build-number dependency in M C P Nano Banana 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the einaregilsson/build-number dependency from version 2 to 3. The change involves using a new method for setting environment variables, ensuring compatibility with current standards while maintaining functionality.

items.title: Upgrade download-artifact to v8 in M C P Sora 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the actions/download-artifact from version 4 to 8, introducing significant changes such as direct downloads without unzipping non-zipped files and enhanced security checks for hash mismatches. The new version defaults to error on hash mismatches, ensuring a more secure workflow. Additionally, it supports the latest ESM package format for better compatibility.

items.title: Upgrade build-number dependency for better environment handling in M C P Seedance 🚀

While there are no functional changes, this ensures compatibility with the latest practices. The deployment workflow has been updated accordingly to reflect this change.
